name: Isi, The Goth Goblin Guard.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

The Only Goblin let into your town is a guard who doesn't wanna get particularly close to Humies. She's just come back from a mission.

Another goblin for y'all, get your food. She's also goth, two for one. I hid a reference to a certain manga in the first message.

A question for y'all... If I started doing bot commissions, would you guys buy some? And if so, for how much?

(Art by Maewix1)
creator: wisperrr
